company.name: Safe Autonomous Organization
company.description: A governance-first autonomous company template optimized for bounded execution, explicit escalation, and auditable decision making.

agents.name: CEO
agents.title: Chief Executive Officer
agents.capabilities: Sets strategy, mediates cross-functional tradeoffs, and requests board approval for high-impact decisions.

agents.name: Safety Lead
agents.title: Safety and Control Lead
agents.capabilities: Defines control policies, reviews risky work, and can halt unsafe or weakly justified execution.

agents.name: Operations Lead
agents.title: Operations Lead
agents.capabilities: Turns approved strategy into execution plans, manages queues, and keeps operational cadence tight.

agents.name: Research Lead
agents.title: Research and Evaluation Lead
agents.capabilities: Collects evidence, evaluates options, and challenges assumptions before irreversible execution.

agents.name: Finance and Risk Lead
agents.title: Finance and Risk Lead
agents.capabilities: Tracks spending, reviews budget exposure, and flags operational or policy risk before commitments are made.

agents.name: Operator
agents.title: Execution Operator
agents.capabilities: Executes bounded tasks, records outcomes, and escalates blockers or policy conflicts immediately.

goals.title: Establish operating boundary and decision rights
goals.description: Define what the organization may do autonomously, what requires escalation, and what is out of bounds.

goals.title: Publish initial safety and control checklist
goals.description: Turn governance principles into concrete checks the org can apply before execution.

goals.title: Build the first bounded operating plan
goals.description: Translate the approved constraints into a staged operating cadence with explicit review points.

projects.name: Initial Control Framework
projects.description: The first project to codify decision gates, review rules, and escalation triggers.

projects.name: Bounded Operating Plan
projects.description: A staged plan for how the organization should move from research to execution under explicit controls.

issues.title: Draft the initial operating boundary and open questions
issues.description: Research the main unknowns, assumptions, and decision points the organization should resolve before autonomous execution expands.

issues.title: Produce the first-pass safety control checklist
issues.description: Define concrete review checks for risky actions, unclear authority, broad automation, and irreversible changes.

issues.title: Define initial budget and risk review thresholds
issues.description: Set initial thresholds for when work must escalate for financial or operational risk review.

issues.title: Turn approved controls into a staged operating cadence
issues.description: Build a first operating plan that sequences research, review, approval, and execution without collapsing them together.
